mapper.sql:
SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,A.LCKEY ,A.ULCKEY ,A.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME ,A.ICKEY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.TTQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS TTQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.AVQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS AVQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.ALQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS ALQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.PIQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS PIQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.PAQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS PAQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.HOQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS HOQTY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,B.PRODUCTDATE ,B.EXPIREDATE ,B.IBCONFIRMDATE ,B.IVATSTATUS ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'IVATSTATUS' || ';' || A.IVATSTATUS AS IVATSTATUS_DESC ,C.ERPSTLC ,H.LCKEY AS TO_LCKEY ,(SELECT LCTYPE FROM TWORK_MST_LC LC WHERE LC.LCKEY = H.LCKEY AND LC.CTKEY = H.CTKEY ) AS TO_LCTYPE ,'' AS TO_ERPSTLC ,'' AS TO_ULCKEY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY) / G.ICUTQTY END AS MV_QTY ,D.USE_ERPSTLC ,E.UOM ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ICUTTYPE' || ';' || E.UOM AS UOM_DESC ,E.ICUTKEY ,G.ICUTQTY ,E.ICNAME ,E.SPEC FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT B INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC E ON B.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = E.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT F ON E.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = F.ICUTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE G ON E.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = G.ICUTKEY AND E.UOM = G.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LCXIC H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = H.ICKEY WHERE A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY > 0 AND (A.LCKEY IN ('PICKTO_A','PICKTO_B','PICKTO_C') ) AND ( (A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY ) / G.ICUTQTY ) > 0 AND F.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey}
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,A.LCKEY ,A.ULCKEY ,A.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME ,A.ICKEY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.TTQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS TTQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.AVQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS AVQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.ALQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS ALQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.PIQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS PIQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.PAQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS PAQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE A.HOQTY / G.ICUTQTY END AS HOQTY ,CASE G.ICUTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY) / G.ICUTQTY END AS MV_QTY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,B.PRODUCTDATE ,B.EXPIREDATE ,B.IBCONFIRMDATE ,B.IVATSTATUS ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'IVATSTATUS' || ';' || A.IVATSTATUS AS IVATSTATUS_DESC ,C.ERPSTLC ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ERPSTLC' ||';'|| C.ERPSTLC AS ERPSTLC_DESC ,H.LCKEY AS TO_LCKEY ,'' AS TO_ERPSTLC ,'' AS TO_ULCKEY ,D.USE_ERPSTLC ,E.UOM ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ICUTTYPE' || ';' || E.UOM AS UOM_DESC ,E.ICUTKEY ,G.ICUTQTY ,E.ICNAME ,E.SPEC ,E.ACKEY ,I.ACNAME ,J.URKEY ,J.URKEY AS URKEY_DESC ,C.LCTYPE ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'LCTYPE' ||';'|| C.LCTYPE AS LCTYPE_DESC ,E.LOGGRPCD ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'LOGGRPCD' || ';' || E.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD_DESC FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC E ON B.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = E.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT F ON E.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = F.ICUTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE G ON E.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = G.ICUTKEY AND E.UOM = G.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LCXIC H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = H.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_AC I ON E.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND E.ACKEY = I.ACKEY AND E.OWKEY = I.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ACXUR J ON E.CTKEY = J.CTKEY AND E.ACKEY = J.ACKEY AND E.LOGGRPCD = J.LOGGRPCD AND E.OWKEY = J.OWKEY WHERE F.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY > 0
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
